question.text: What is the Instant Access Facility in the context of mutual fund investor services?

answer.text: A facility to invest in any mutual fund scheme instantly through UPI
A facility enabling instant redemption of limited amounts from overnight/liquid fund unclaimed amounts without waiting for standard processing timelines
A feature that allows instant KYC verification for new investors
A service that provides instant NAV calculation before market closure

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The Instant Access Facility is specifically designed for unclaimed redemption/dividend amounts that have been deployed in overnight or liquid funds as per SEBI guidelines. It allows investors (or their nominees/heirs) to access these unclaimed amounts instantly, without going through the standard redemption processing timelines, facilitating quick recovery of unclaimed assets. **The Trap:** This is NOT the same as the general instant redemption facility available in liquid/overnight funds (which has its own limits). The Instant Access Facility is specifically for unclaimed amounts deployed in these schemes. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series II-B specifically tests this facility as part of the unclaimed amounts framework; understanding the distinction from regular instant redemption is important. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** When helping clients recover unclaimed amounts, mention the Instant Access Facility — it eliminates the usual waiting period and provides immediate liquidity. This is especially valuable for nominees/heirs who may have urgent financial needs.
